nasb.text: as soon as they put forth leaves, you see it and know for yourselves that summer is now near.

esv.text: As soon as they come out in leaf, you see for yourselves and know that the summer is already near.

cnv.text: 它們甚麼時候發芽，你們看見了，就知道夏天近了。

ccb.text: 当你们看见树木发芽长叶时，就知道夏天近了。

csbs.text: 当它们长出叶子的时候，你们一看就知道夏天已经快到了。
